title: Bioengineering (English) Program Educational Objectives
content:
Bioengineering (English) Program Educational Objectives

Program Educational Objectives

1. Graduates pursue postgraduate education in Bioengineering and related fields at national and/or international universities.

2. Graduates pursue academic careers at national and international levels, working as academics, researchers, or in similar positions.

3. Graduates work in public and/or private institutions and organizations in sectors such as biotechnology, health technologies, biomedical engineering, and the pharmaceutical industry, at various levels and positions, with an awareness of lifelong learning and an entrepreneurial mindset.
